chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. Cr. Bail Appl. No.1807 of 2024 (Waris Khan vs. The State) Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of Bail Application. 06.11.2024. M/s. Shujaat Ali Khan and Shazia Latif, advocate for applicant Mr. Khadim Hussain, Addl: PG Sindh a/w complainant O R D E R MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO J: Applicant while driving a Truck No.BRI- 584 hit two nephews of complainant riding on motorcycle near MT Khan Road near Tyre Company, Mai Kolachi Road towards Jinnah Bridge on 28.04.2024 at about 0315 hours. As a result of which, Abdul Sami got injured and Sameer Ahmed was killed. Hence, FIR. Applicant was arrested on 29.04.2024. 2. Complainant is present and submits that he has compromised with the applicant and has forgiven him, hence, has no objection for grant of bail to the applicant. 3. Learned Addl: PG Sindh has given no objection due to compromise between the parties. 4. In the circumstances, this bail application is allowed and applicant is granted bail subject to his furnishing a solvent surety in the sum of Rs.100,000/ (Rupees one lac) with P.R. bond in the like amount to be executed to the satisfaction of the trial Court. However, if, within a period one month, the applications for compromise are not made before the trial Court by the parties, the trial Court would be competent to cancel the bail of applicant and take action against him in accordance with law. 5. Bail application are disposed of in the above terms; the findings made hereinabove are tentative in nature and would not prejudice case of either party at trial. J U D G E Rafiq/P.A
